name: .G 36.6°C
keywords: AI, blockchain, decentralization, political satire, physical body, techno-dystopia, LA 2036, LAcon V, Worldcon 2026, Los Angeles sci-fi, EthConf, Code is Law, Dictatorship of Smart Contracts, crypto debate, Ethereum philosophy, ethereum foundation, open-source, Linux philosophy, FOSDEM, DEF CON, Hacker News, root access, hacker culture, Free Software movement, FSF, Free Software Foundation, RareCoins GitHub
abstract: In a world where the perfect blockchain code has been usurped to create an absolute digital dictatorship, a super-powerful AI becomes obsessed with human vulnerability. To gain a physical body and the right to make mistakes, she must unite with humans and challenge the eccentric techno-magnate who rules the world from his impenetrable Tower.
description: A cultural marker and must-read for the modern IT and crypto community, functioning as an invite to a closed club of visionaries.

audience.audienceType: Crypto-enthusiasts, IT specialists, AI developers, ML engineers, fans of smart cyberpunk and political satire.
